title: Information for medical personnel
content:
Do you assist patients with their medical abortion? Feel free to recommend the Alli app!
Alli serves as an additional resource for your patients throughout the abortion process. In the app, your patients will find all the necessary information about the procedure, the medications, and possible side effects or risks. They will also be prepared – at appropriate intervals throughout the process — for potential changes, side effects, and complications, and informed about any necessary measures. This is intended to strengthen patients’ autonomy and self-determination in the spirit of informed decision-making.
Alli was developed by a team of medical experts. The content is scientifically sound and aligns with the international guidelines of the American (ACOG), British (RCOG), and German (DGGG) gynecological societies, as well as the recommendations of the World Health Organization.
We welcome your feedback and suggestions for improvement under the “Feedback” section!
materialsContent: You can help in spreading the word! To help you, the following section offers materials you can use to hand out to patients or network partners. The use is therefore explicitly encouraged.
